name: create_incident
description: Create a new incident on a status page to communicate an ongoing service disruption or maintenance event. Specify the incident name, initial status (investigating, identified, monitoring, resolved), impact severity, a body message describing the issue, and optionally link affected components with their statuses.

parameters.name: page_id
parameters.description: The ID of the status page.

parameters.name: incident.body
parameters.description: Initial status update message describing the incident.

parameters.name: incident.component_ids
parameters.description: Array of component IDs affected by this incident.

parameters.name: incident.components
parameters.description: Object mapping component IDs to their status during the incident (e.g. {"cmp1a2b3c4d": "partial_outage"}).

parameters.name: incident.deliver_notifications
parameters.description: Whether to send subscriber notifications (default true).

incident.name: Database Connection Issues
incident.body: We are investigating reports of database connection timeouts affecting multiple services. Our engineering team is actively working to identify the root cause.

incident_updates.body: We are investigating reports of database connection timeouts affecting multiple services. Our engineering team is actively working to identify the root cause.
